transcript: --unless you're speaking a foreign language I'm not familiar with, which is what it sounds like, I'm not familiar with it.
We don't sell oscilloscopes. You called me about six weeks ago and asked me about this.
It's not an oscilloscope, it's an oscilloscope-related product.
Right. We don't sell those things.
[indiscernible] ...the Tandy Corporation sells them under a different name for some other company.
Hm. How much is that retailing for, in stock?
Sir, you're wasting my time. I'm gonna hang up, and I'm not going to answer again next time you call.
Don't hang up, sir! Give me one more--
Then get straight with me very quickly.
Okay. I'm interested in buying a PC this evening. That's my second reason for calling.
This is the same game we played last time... [indiscernible]
--and you keep hanging up when I... when I go to get information.
You called a little while ago and asked me about the "flutter rate" for an LCD screen. There is no such measurement on an LCD screen.
So there is no flutter on that unit, is that what you're telling me?
There is no "flutter rate" measurement on an LCD screen.
So it is a good unit then, right?
